user_objective: Plan a three-day ski trip to Mt. Hood with weather, lodging, equipment, avalanche conditions, and transportation.

subtasks.objective: Forecast and historical conditions for Mt. Hood Meadows for trip window
Surface conditions, avalanche bulletin summary, terrain notes
Clothing and gear recommendations given forecast and skill level
Transportation options from Portland to Meadows
Budget estimate: lift, lodging, gear rental
Synthesize subtask results into one actionable trip plan
